myTickets.title: Your support requests
myTickets.descDefault: Your open requests and recent activity at a glance.
myTickets.emptyNewDesc: Open your first request and our team will pick it up from here.
myTickets.emptyFilterDesc: Try clearing filters, switching tabs, or opening a new request.

filter.search: Search by ticket ID, title, or product

newTicket.title: Open a support request
newTicket.subtitle: Tell us what's happening. A clear description and the right context help our team reach you with an accurate resolution faster.
newTicket.trustResponse: First response is usually provided within 4 business hours.
newTicket.trustPrivate: Visible only to you and our support team
newTicket.sectionDescribeDesc: A short title and clear description help us route this to the right team.
newTicket.sectionContextDesc: Help us route this to the right product team and set the right urgency.
newTicket.sectionAttachmentsDesc: Optional. Screenshots, logs, or short recordings help our team respond faster.
newTicket.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Unable to access the billing portal
newTicket.descriptionPlaceholder: What happened? What did you expect to see? Include steps to reproduce and any error messages.
newTicket.toolbarHint: Use the toolbar below your message for bold, lists, and emphasis.
newTicket.fileTypes: Supported: jpg, jpeg, png, pdf, txt, log, zip — up to 10 MB each, max 5 files per person on this ticket
newTicket.footerNote: By submitting, you agree that our support team may contact you about this request.

ticketDetail.errorNotFound: The request could not be found.
ticketDetail.declinedBannerSub: Our team is working on it using the reason you provided.
ticketDetail.decisionDesc: Review our solution in the conversation, then confirm whether your issue is fixed.
ticketDetail.declineLabel: Tell us what still needs help
ticketDetail.declinePlaceholder: Describe what still needs to be fixed so our team can help.
ticketDetail.closedNotice: This request has been closed. If you need further help, please open a new request.
ticketDetail.replyDesc: Your message appears in the conversation above after you send.
ticketDetail.noAttachments: No files have been shared on this request yet.
ticketDetail.trustDesc: Only you and our support team can see this conversation. You'll be notified by email when we respond.

closeModal.title: Close this request?
closeModal.reasonLabel: Please let us know why you're closing it.

errors.listFailed: Your requests could not be loaded.
errors.loadFailed: This request could not be loaded.
errors.replyFailed: Your reply could not be sent.
errors.approveSyncPending: Your approval was sent. The page is still catching up — refresh if the status looks unchanged.
errors.rejectSyncPending: Your feedback was sent. The page is still catching up — refresh if the status looks unchanged.
